results.title: Bangar said he is at a loss for words when describing Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s ability
results.description: Rajasthan Royals’ teenager Vaibhav Sooryavanshi scored a blistering 93 off 38 balls to lead his team’s chase of 221 against Lucknow Super Giants at the Sawai Mansingh Stadium. Opening with Yashasvi Jaiswal, he reached his fifty in 23 balls and became the first Indian batter in IPL history to hit 50 sixes in a single [...] The post Bangar said he is at a loss for words when describing Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s ability first appeared on Nagaland Post .
